mapper.sql: select id, service_id, total_cost, drug_cost, treatment_cost, surgery_cost, inspection_cost, laboratory_cost, bed_cost, nursing_cost, other_cost, insurance_paid, self_paid, cost_category, created_at from medical_cost
mapper.insert:
insert into medical_cost
service_id, total_cost, drug_cost, treatment_cost, surgery_cost, inspection_cost, laboratory_cost, bed_cost, nursing_cost, other_cost, insurance_paid, self_paid, cost_category, created_at,
#{serviceId}, #{totalCost}, #{drugCost}, #{treatmentCost}, #{surgeryCost}, #{inspectionCost}, #{laboratoryCost}, #{bedCost}, #{nursingCost}, #{otherCost}, #{insurancePaid}, #{selfPaid}, #{costCategory}, #{createdAt},
mapper.delete:
delete from medical_cost where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select coalesce(sum(total_cost), 0) as totalCost, coalesce(avg(total_cost), 0) as avgCost, coalesce(sum(insurance_paid), 0) as totalInsurancePaid, coalesce(sum(self_paid), 0) as totalSelfPaid, count(*) as totalRecords from medical_cost c join medical_service s on c.service_id = s.id
and s.org_id = #{orgId} and year(s.service_date) = #{year}

select coalesce(sum(drug_cost), 0) as drugCost, coalesce(sum(treatment_cost), 0) as treatmentCost, coalesce(sum(surgery_cost), 0) as surgeryCost, coalesce(sum(inspection_cost), 0) as inspectionCost, coalesce(sum(laboratory_cost), 0) as laboratoryCost, coalesce(sum(bed_cost), 0) as bedCost, coalesce(sum(nursing_cost), 0) as nursingCost, coalesce(sum(other_cost), 0) as otherCost from medical_cost c join medical_service s on c.service_id = s.id
and s.org_id = #{orgId} and year(s.service_date) = #{year}

select cost_category as name, coalesce(sum(total_cost), 0) as totalCost, coalesce(sum(insurance_paid), 0) as insurancePaid, coalesce(sum(self_paid), 0) as selfPaid from medical_cost c join medical_service s on c.service_id = s.id where cost_category is not null and cost_category != '' and s.org_id = #{orgId} and year(s.service_date) = #{year} group by cost_category

select date_format(s.service_date, '%Y-%m') as month, round(avg(c.total_cost), 2) as avgCost from medical_cost c join medical_service s on c.service_id = s.id group by date_format(s.service_date, '%Y-%m') order by month

select date_format(s.service_date, '%Y') as year, coalesce(sum(c.total_cost), 0) as totalCost, coalesce(sum(c.insurance_paid), 0) as insurancePaid, coalesce(sum(c.self_paid), 0) as selfPaid from medical_cost c join medical_service s on c.service_id = s.id group by date_format(s.service_date, '%Y') order by year

select cost_category as name, coalesce(sum(total_cost), 0) as totalCost, count(*) as count from medical_cost c join medical_service s on c.service_id = s.id where cost_category is not null and cost_category != '' and s.org_id = #{orgId} and year(s.service_date) = #{year} group by cost_category order by totalCost desc
